name: electoquest
description: Gamified Election Awareness Platform with AI Civic Guru

scripts.minify:js: npx terser public/js/utils.js -o public/js/utils.min.js --compress --mangle && npx terser public/js/quests.js -o public/js/quests.min.js --compress --mangle && npx terser public/js/auth.js -o public/js/auth.min.js --compress --mangle && npx terser public/js/ui.js -o public/js/ui.min.js --compress --mangle && npx terser public/js/chatbot.js -o public/js/chatbot.min.js --compress --mangle && npx terser public/js/app.js -o public/js/app.min.js --compress --mangle
scripts.minify: npm run minify:js && npm run minify:css
